'''labotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hican|hican]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-b-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hican|hican]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| labotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læbetheth|læbetheth]] || [[word:læbethej|læbethej]] || [[word:læbethesh|læbethesh]] || [[word:læbethe|læbethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:labobothoth|labobothoth]] || [[word:labobothoj|labobothoj]] || [[word:labobothosh|labobothosh]] || [[word:labobotho|labobotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:labothoth|labothoth]] || [[word:labothoj|labothoj]] || [[word:labothosh|labothosh]] || [[word:labotho|labotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:labofthoth|labofthoth]] || [[word:labofthoj|labofthoj]] || [[word:labofthosh|labofthosh]] || [[word:labofthof|labofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:labothotho|labothotho]] || [[word:labothojo|labothojo]] || [[word:labothosho|labothosho]] || [[word:labothoko|labothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:labothoth|labothoth]] || [[word:labothoj|labothoj]] || [[word:labothosh|labothosh]] || [[word:labotho|labotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:labothothol|labothothol]] || [[word:labothojol|labothojol]] || [[word:labothoshol|labothoshol]] || [[word:labothokol|labothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:labothothotho|labothothotho]] || [[word:labothojojo|labothojojo]] || [[word:labothoshosho|labothoshosho]] || [[word:labothoko|labothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:labothothon|labothothon]] || [[word:labothojon|labothojon]] || [[word:labothoshon|labothoshon]] || [[word:labothokon|labothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:labothothoro|labothothoro]] || [[word:labothojoro|labothojoro]] || [[word:labothoshoro|labothoshoro]] || [[word:labothokoro|labothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
